summary: Completed frontend testing of School CRM features: selected_offerings display, meeting_date/time display, and Raise Ticket modal with Query Type selector and FAQ auto-fill. All features verified working correctly.

features_verified.feature: School CRM - selected_offerings field displays on school cards
features_verified.verification: School cards show 'Offerings:' label with purple badges. Example: 'Test School With Offerings' shows 'offering_1, offering_2'. 'TEST_School_18e38d' shows 'robotics_basic, coding_python'. If offering title not found, displays offering ID.

features_verified.feature: School CRM - meeting_date and meeting_time display on school cards
features_verified.verification: School cards show meeting info in red text with Calendar icon. Example: 'Test School With Offerings' shows 'Meeting: 2026-02-10 at 10:00 AM'.

features_verified.feature: School CRM - Raise Ticket modal has Query Type selector
features_verified.verification: Raise Ticket modal shows 'Query Type *' label with 9 query type buttons in a scrollable container: Kit Delivery Issue, Payment Query, Teacher Training, Technical Support, Curriculum Query, Schedule Change, Contract/Renewal, Feedback/Complaint, Other.

features_verified.feature: School CRM - Clicking a query type auto-fills Subject and Description fields
features_verified.verification: Clicking 'Kit Delivery Issue' auto-fills Subject with 'Kit Delivery Issue' and Description with 'We have not received the kit delivery yet / items are missing or damaged. Please help resolve this.' Clicking 'Other' auto-fills Subject with 'Other' and leaves Description empty (as expected).

features_verified.feature: School CRM - Raise Ticket requires query_type to be selected before submitting
features_verified.verification: The 'Raise Ticket' submit button is disabled (not clickable) when no query_type is selected. Button becomes enabled only after selecting a query type. Code confirms: disabled={!ticketData.query_type || !ticketData.subject}

context_for_next_testing_agent: School CRM Raise Ticket modal has TICKET_QUERIES constant with 9 query types defined at lines 43-53 in AdminSchoolCRM.jsx. Query type selector auto-fills subject and description from FAQ. Button validation at line 6803 ensures query_type is required. School cards display selected_offerings (lines 2448-2460) and meeting_date/time (lines 2429-2434).
